since_last: 49% of 89 AI names green; Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical leads +2.57%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 49% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +1.18% · BTC -2.03% · Gold +0.55% · Nasdaq100 +2.25%. 49% of 89 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical is doing the heavy lifting at +2.57%.

cards.headline: Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at +2.57%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -0.54%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: AVAV is the standout at +35.27%
cards.body: Leaders: AVAV +35.27%, LRCX +2.40%, AMAT +2.30%, OKLO +1.93%, OKLO +1.93%. Laggards: DLR -4.54%, TTD -4.02%, FTNT -1.81%, WDAY -1.41%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.44% at $163.46
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.44% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
